modules.title: What is Claude?
modules.description: Honest overview of what Claude is, how it differs from ChatGPT, and why developers are switching.
takeaways: Claude is built by Anthropic — focused on safety + helpfulness
Stronger at long documents, nuanced writing, and coding
Free tier available at claude.ai — no credit card needed
Has Projects feature for persistent context across chats

modules.title: Claude vs ChatGPT — honest comparison
modules.description: A developer's take on when to use Claude vs ChatGPT. No sponsored opinions.
takeaways: Claude wins on: long context, nuanced instructions, coding
ChatGPT wins on: plugins ecosystem, image generation
Both have free tiers — try both before deciding
For building AI products: Claude API is cleaner to work with

modules.title: Your first Claude conversation
modules.description: How to get the most out of claude.ai from day one. Features most people miss.
takeaways: Use Projects to give Claude persistent memory
Upload files — Claude reads PDFs, CSVs, code
Use voice mode on mobile for quick queries
Claude.ai has a free tier — start there

modules.title: Prompt engineering fundamentals
modules.description: The difference between a good prompt and a great one. Practical patterns that work.
takeaways: Be specific — vague prompts get vague answers
Give Claude a role: 'You are a senior React developer'
Use examples — show it what good output looks like
Ask Claude to think step by step for complex problems

modules.title: System prompts — what they are and why they matter
modules.description: System prompts are how you turn Claude into a custom AI for any use case.
takeaways: System prompt = instructions Claude follows for entire conversation
Use it to set tone, role, output format, constraints
In Claude.ai: use Projects custom instructions
In API: pass as system parameter

modules.title: Claude for coding — real developer workflows
modules.description: How I use Claude daily to write, debug, and review code faster.
takeaways: Paste your full file — Claude handles large context
Ask for code review before asking for fixes
Use Claude to write tests for existing code
Claude Code (CLI) for agentic coding tasks

modules.title: Claude + n8n — automation workflows
modules.description: How I connect Claude to n8n to automate real business workflows.
takeaways: Claude node available natively in n8n
Use Claude to classify, summarise, generate in workflows
My job evaluator project uses this pattern
Combine with Gmail, Sheets, Telegram for full automation

tracks.title: Building with Claude API
tracks.subtitle: Ship real AI products with Claude.

modules.title: Claude API setup in 10 minutes
modules.description: From zero to your first API call. Next.js + TypeScript setup walkthrough.
takeaways: Get API key from console.anthropic.com
Install: npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk
Never expose API key in frontend — use API routes
Start with claude-haiku for cheap testing

modules.title: Streaming responses in React
modules.description: Make your AI app feel instant — stream Claude responses word by word.
takeaways: Streaming makes UX feel 10x faster
Use Server-Sent Events (SSE) in Next.js API route
ReadableStream + TextDecoder in the frontend
Vercel AI SDK simplifies this significantly

modules.title: RAG — give Claude your own data
modules.description: How to build a document Q&A system using Claude + embeddings + Pinecone.
takeaways: RAG = give Claude relevant context at runtime
Embed documents → store in vector DB → retrieve on query
Pinecone + Claude is the simplest stack to start
This is how my job evaluator project works

modules.title: Claude + Voice AI (Vapi)
modules.description: How I built an AI voice agent that books flat appointments using Vapi + Claude.
takeaways: Vapi handles voice layer — Claude handles intelligence
Define assistant personality in system prompt
Tool calling lets Claude trigger real actions
My flat booking agent uses this exact pattern
